general.creator: Created By
general.not_found_subtitle: Sorry, it seems you've reached an unexpected page.
general.leave_confirm: Are you sure you want to leave this page?
general.name: Name

facade.asset_placeholder: Asset name, protocol, tags, network address

delete_confirm.title: Are you sure you want to delete this file?
delete_confirm.content: This action will permanently delete the file. Continue?

fs.drag_upload_disabled: Uploads are not allowed by current policy

setup.already_done_subtitle: This system has already been initialized. Please go to the login page.

reset_password.confirm_content: If no password is entered, a random one will be generated and sent by email.

reset_otp.confirm_content: After reset, user can log in without 2FA.

external_identity.title: External Accounts
external_identity.unbind_confirm: Unlink this external account? If this is the user's last login method, the system will reject the unlink.

oidc_client.created_copy_tip: ⚠️ Please copy and save the secret immediately; it won't be shown again after closing.
oidc_client.new_secret_tip: ⚠️ Please copy and save the new secret immediately; it won't be shown again after closing.
oidc_client.regenerate_secret_confirm: Are you sure you want to rotate this client's secret? The old secret will be invalid immediately.
oidc_client.title: OIDC Client List
oidc_client.client_id_placeholder: Please enter a unique Client ID
oidc_client.client_id_tooltip: Client ID cannot be modified after creation
oidc_client.redirect_uris_required: Please add at least one redirect URI
oidc_client.grant_types_required: Please select at least one grant type
oidc_client.scopes_required: Please select at least one scope
oidc_client.access_control_tip: Control which users can use this OIDC client
oidc_client.bound_users_placeholder: Please select users who can use this client
oidc_client.bound_users_required: Please select at least one user
oidc_client.bound_departments_placeholder: Please select departments authorized for this client
oidc_client.bound_departments_required: Please select at least one department
oidc_client.skip_consent_tip: After enabled, users who are logged in and pass access control will not see the authorization confirmation page.

sysops.spec_tooltip: Supports second-level scheduling. Unlike standard cron, the first field is seconds (Quartz compatible), but the year field is not supported.

monitoring.title: System Monitoring
monitoring.description: View CPU, memory, local storage, and key backend service status in one place.
monitoring.critical_alert_desc: Handle CPU, memory, or local storage issues as soon as possible to avoid service impact.
monitoring.global_critical_desc: The backend environment has reached a critical threshold. Open system monitoring and handle it soon.

storage.warning: Recording path is not configured or not accessible

logs.label: Logs
logs.clear_confirm_content: Confirm clear all logs? This action cannot be undone.

exec_command.scope_tip: Only non-interactive commands executed through SSH exec are recorded here, for example ssh user@host asset "ls -la". Commands entered in interactive terminals are available in offline session playback.

accessLog.clearConfirmContent: Clear all access logs? This action cannot be undone.

disconnect.confirm: Are you sure you want to disconnect this session?

rdp_proxy.label: RDP Proxy
rdp_proxy.unsupported_online_action: RDP Proxy sessions do not support online monitoring or disconnect yet

wol.title: Wake-on-LAN
wol.message: Asset {{name}} is offline. Wake it up?
wol.countdown_message: Waiting for device to start, time remaining:
wol.online_desc: Asset has been awakened and is online, you can connect now
wol.offline_desc: Asset may not be fully started, please retry later

terminal.close_confirm: Are you sure you want to close this terminal?

account.access_token_once_tip: Token is shown only once. Please keep it safe.
account.client_cert_once_tip: The certificate can be downloaded only once. If lost, regenerate it.

login.oidc_error: OIDC login failed, please try again
login.wechat_work_error: WeCom login failed, please try again

external_binding.title: Link a local account
external_binding.provider_wechat: This WeCom identity is not linked to a local account
external_binding.provider_oidc: This OIDC identity is not linked to a local account
external_binding.bind_with_passkey: Sign in with Passkey and link

account.ssh_key_desc: Manage SSH public keys used by desktop clients to log in to the bastion host.
account.ssh_key_name_tip: Optional. If empty, the server will generate a name from the key comment or fingerprint.
account.ssh_key_public_key_tip: Paste a single OpenSSH-format public key. Private keys are not accepted.
account.ssh_key_delete_content: Are you sure you want to remove SSH key {{name}}?
account.otp_bind_sub_title: Multi-factor authentication — login identity verification, safer access control.
account.otp_unbind_title: Are you sure you want to disable MFA?
account.otp_unbind_subtitle: Disabling it may increase the risk of account compromise.
account.otp_description: Two-factor authentication (OTP) provides extra protection for your account. Even if your password is leaked, attackers cannot access your account without your mobile device.

otp_features.title: Features
otp_features.enhanced_security: Enhanced security: adds an extra security layer to login
otp_features.offline_access: Offline access: generate codes without network connection
otp_features.time_based: Time-based: codes refresh every 30 seconds for security
otp_features.widely_supported: Widely supported: compatible with mainstream authenticator apps

step1.title: Step 1: Install an authenticator app
step1.description: Install any of the following apps on your phone:

step2.title: Step 2: Scan the QR code
step2.description: Use the authenticator app to scan the QR code below, or enter the key manually

step3.title: Step 3: Enter the code
step3.description: Enter the 6-digit code shown in the authenticator app to complete binding

account.otp_manual_setup_desc: If you can't scan the QR code, enter this key manually in your authenticator app:
account.otp_scan_instruction: Please use the authenticator app to scan the QR code above
account.otp_verification_instruction: Please enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
account.otp_security_description: After binding, your account will be protected by MFA. Please keep your authenticator device safe.
account.otp_step2_description: Scan the QR code with the authenticator app
account.otp_step3_description: Enter the code to complete binding
account.passkey_delete_content: Passkey provides better protection for your account and assets; it's recommended to keep it.
account.no_mfa_title: Please bind a security authentication method
account.no_mfa_subtitle: You haven't bound any security method and cannot view sensitive data.
account.auth_type_passkey_desc: Authenticate with biometrics or security key
account.oidc_server_authorizations_desc: Manage third-party apps authorized to access your account
account.oidc_server_authorization_revoke_content: Are you sure you want to revoke {{clientId}}? It will no longer access your account info.

oidc_consent.title: Authorization Request
oidc_consent.subtitle: Please confirm the following authorization info
oidc_consent.request_access_desc: This app will be able to perform the following actions on your behalf
oidc_consent.warning: After authorization, {{clientId}} can access the info you selected. You can revoke at any time in account settings.

oauth_consent.title: External App Authorization
oauth_consent.subtitle: {{name}} is requesting access to your account
oauth_consent.requested_scopes: The following permissions will be granted
oauth_consent.warning: Once approved, {{name}} will hold an access token for one year. You can revoke it anytime from the Access Tokens page.
oauth_consent.load_error: Unable to load authorization info. Please restart the flow.

scope.assets.read: Read the list of accessible assets
scope.token.revoke_self: Revoke this access token (used when disconnecting)

account.mfa_passkey_prompt: Please complete Passkey authentication in the browser popup

assets.alias_placeholder: Only letters, numbers, underscores or hyphens, and start with a letter
assets.alias_invalid: Alias must start with a letter and contain only letters, numbers, underscores or hyphens
assets.alias_tip: When directly connecting to SSH Server, the alias can be used as the target name.
assets.resize_method_extra: How the RDP server should be updated when the client display size changes.

resize_methods.display_update_desc: Use the RDP 8.1 "Display Update" channel to notify the server of display size changes
resize_methods.reconnect_desc: Automatically disconnect and reconnect with the new size when client display size changes

assets.rdp_drive_path_extra: If not selected, the operator's default storage will be used
assets.domain_tip: The domain used to access protected assets (e.g., www.example.com) must resolve to this system's IP.
assets.origin_timeout_tip: Maximum time the proxy waits for the origin to respond before returning an error.
assets.entrance_tip: Entry path is the page opened automatically on first access

batch_edit.title: Batch Edit
batch_edit.scope_tip: AI settings apply only to selected SSH assets; assets using other protocols are skipped. Gateway settings apply to all selected assets. Unchecked settings remain unchanged.
batch_edit.gateway_required: Add at least one gateway or use the group default gateway
batch_edit.success_ai: Updated AI settings for {{count}} SSH assets and skipped {{skippedCount}} non-SSH assets
batch_edit.success_ai_gateway: Updated AI settings for {{aiCount}} SSH assets and skipped {{skippedCount}} non-SSH assets; updated gateway settings for {{gatewayCount}} assets
batch_edit.no_ssh_asset: No SSH assets were selected, so no AI settings were changed

assets.ssh_gateway_required_after_first_hop: Only SSH gateway can be used after the first hop
assets.custom_header_tip: You can add multiple headers in the format: Key: Value.
assets.import_asset_tip: When importing assets, account/password and key/passphrase are mutually exclusive; if both are provided, key/passphrase takes precedence.
assets.import_asset_error_title: Please check the import file; the following assets failed to import:
assets.credential_delete_referenced_title: Credential is in use and cannot be deleted
assets.public_tip: Restriction applies only to anonymous users.
assets.limit_ip_tip: Restrict users to access assets only from specified IPs. CIDR supported, e.g., 192.168.1.0/24. Dash ranges supported, e.g., 192.168.1.0-192.168.1.255. Multiple IPs can be entered on separate lines, or separated by commas or semicolons.
assets.limit_country_tip: Restrict anonymous access to specified countries; supports Chinese or English names.
assets.limit_province_tip: Restrict anonymous access to specified provinces/states; supports Chinese or English names.
assets.limit_city_tip: Restrict anonymous access to specified cities; supports Chinese or English names.
assets.limit_geo_input_tip: Press Enter to add a tag; you can add multiple.
assets.limit_password_tip: Access asset only with correct passcode.
assets.temp_allow_duration_tip: After clicking the button, the current IP is allowed for the duration.
assets.temp_allow_auto_renew_tip: When enabled, each request extends the validity.

certificates.self_signed_tip_title: Tip: You can replace the root certificate yourself; take effect after restart.
certificates.is_default_tooltip: Default certificate is used when no other certificate matches.
certificates.renew_confirm_content: The certificate will be re-issued and updated. Continue?

stats.no_data_desc: Logs will be displayed in realtime during certificate operations

dns_providers.remove_confirm_content: After removal, certificates cannot be requested

assets.enable_alive_check_extra: Periodically checks whether the target asset is online during a connection to detect connection issues promptly. Some hardware switches may not support this check; turn it off if connections fail or disconnect frequently.
assets.enable_detect_os_extra: When the asset logo is empty, the system attempts to identify the operating system and apply a matching icon automatically. Some hardware switches may not support this detection; turn it off if connections fail or detection behaves unexpectedly.

ai.enabled_extra: When enabled, global AI can search and operate this SSH asset.
ai.restricted_shell_extra: For network devices, firewalls, switches, and other environments that need stricter command confirmation.
ai.restricted_shell_tip: Restricted Shell forces every AI command to require confirmation.
ai.command_policy_extra: Empty means following the global AI setting.

wol.mac_addr_placeholder: Please enter MAC address, format: AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF
wol.wakeup_delay_tooltip: Time to wait after sending wake packet

security.mode_extra: Security mode for RDP connection, determines encryption and auth type.
security.ignore_cert_extra: Ignore server certificate even if invalid (e.g., self-signed).
security.cert_tofu_extra: Enable FreeRDP TOFU policy: trust unknown certificates on first use.
security.cert_fingerprints_extra: Comma-separated list of certificate fingerprints and hashes; server cert will be verified.
security.disable_auth_extra: Disable authentication during connection (does not affect login within remote desktop session).

modes.any_desc: Automatically choose based on client and server supported security protocols (default)
modes.nla_desc: Use TLS encryption; requires username and password
modes.nla_ext_desc: Same as NLA, but requires server to send additional "early user authorization result"
modes.tls_desc: RDP authentication and encryption via TLS, mainly for load balancer setups
modes.vmconnect_desc: Auto select security mode, limited to Hyper-V/VMConnect supported protocols
modes.rdp_desc: Legacy RDP encryption mode, typically for older Windows servers

website_response_modify.match_path_tip: Path to match, e.g., /api/data (empty matches all paths)
website_response_modify.match_method_tip: HTTP method to match (empty matches all methods)
website_response_modify.match_status_tip: HTTP status code to match, e.g., 200, 404 (0 matches all status codes)
website_response_modify.remove_headers_tip: Response headers to remove (header names only)
website_response_modify.use_regex_tip: Whether to treat search text as a regex

assets.auto_fetch_favicon_failed: Failed to fetch icon, please check if the target address is correct
assets.public_header_whitelist_tip: Allow requests carrying any of the specified headers, case-insensitive.
assets.public_path_whitelist_tip: Allow traffic if it matches any path; regular expressions are supported.

group_tree.title: Group
group_tree.tip: Drag to reorder; right-click to create, edit, or delete (except the Default group)
group_tree.name: Group Name

gateways.gateway_delete_referenced_title: Gateway is in use and cannot be deleted
gateways.install_windows_service_tip: After registration, it will be installed as a Windows service and started automatically
gateways.install_system_service_tip: After registration, it will be installed as a system service and started automatically

watermark.enabled_tip: When enabled, watermark information is shown in terminal or remote desktop sessions for SSH, RDP, VNC, and TELNET assets.

recording_convert.tip: After transcoding, recordings are saved as MP4 and can be downloaded for local playback. Recordings that are not transcoded can only be replayed in the system web page.

password.too_short: Password length cannot be less than
password.too_simple: Password must contain at least {{count}} of uppercase, lowercase, numbers, special characters

login_lock.tip: When enabled, continuous failures within the specified time will lock account or IP. To lift the restriction, please visit

asset_access.recording_tip: When enabled, sessions for SSH, RDP, VNC, and TELNET assets are saved for later audit and playback.
asset_access.recording_storage_tip: Settings saved here take precedence over startup configuration. The local recording directory is always read from the configuration file, and WebDAV is only configured here.
asset_access.recording_path_readonly_tip: The local recording directory cannot be changed here. Update the configuration file and restart the service.

ai.disclaimer_description: Content and commands generated by the AI assistant may be incorrect, incomplete, misleading, or dangerous. After enabling it, evaluate outputs yourself and confirm the intent and impact before running any command. Any risks and consequences arising from use of the AI assistant are borne by the user.
ai.disclaimer_required: Please check I understand the risk first
ai.profile_empty: No AI environment yet. Create one first.
ai.api_type_tip: Select the API type supported by the model provider.
ai.base_url_tip: OpenAI-compatible API endpoint. Trailing slashes are removed automatically.
ai.api_key_edit_tip: Leave this blank while editing to keep the current API Key. Enter a new value to replace it.
ai.models_tip: Enter model names manually, or load the model list from the provider.
ai.models_empty: The model provider did not return any available models
ai.models_load_config_required: Please fill Base URL and API Key first
ai.reasoning_protocol_tip: Keep the default when the model protocol is unclear; the backend will not attach reasoning fields.
ai.thinking_mode_tip: The thinking-parameter protocol enables thinking by default; reasoning_effort is omitted when thinking is disabled.
ai.thinking_mode_qwen_tip: Qwen omits enable_thinking by default; enabled or disabled is sent as enable_thinking.
ai.reasoning_effort_tip: Only applies to models that support reasoning_effort.
ai.reasoning_effort_thinking_object_tip: The thinking-parameter protocol only supports high or max.
ai.thinking_budget_tip: thinking_budget for Qwen enable_thinking. 0 uses provider defaults.
ai.context_window_tip: Maximum context length of the selected model, used for AI session context control.
ai.max_retries_tip: Maximum automatic retries when model provider requests fail.
ai.user_agent_tip: Leave empty to use the built-in default User-Agent.
ai.http_proxy_tip: Leave empty for direct access. Chat and model list requests for this API profile use the proxy when set.
ai.include_command_snippets_tip: When enabled, AI can read summaries of command snippets visible to the current user, and request specific content only when needed.
ai.custom_system_prompt_tip: Appended after the built-in system prompt. Maximum 8000 characters.

access_request.enabled_tip: When enabled, users can submit access requests from the resource portal. When disabled, the user entry is hidden and user-side access request APIs are blocked.

http_proxy.readonly_tip: Runtime settings come from config.yaml and are read-only here. Restart the service after changing the file.
http_proxy.template_tip: Templates are returned directly as HTML. Keep required placeholders and ensure the password page contains a form field named password. Changes take effect immediately.
http_proxy.password_page_help: The page must submit a field named password using POST.

geodata.unavailable: No GEO database is available. Region lookup is currently unavailable.
geodata.upload_tip: Click or drag an .mmdb file here, up to 200 MB
geodata.file_too_large: The file must be larger than 0 and no more than 200 MB
geodata.upload_success: The GEO database was uploaded and loaded
geodata.update_available: A new GEO data version is available
geodata.already_latest: The current database is up to date
geodata.update_started: The GEO update task has started
geodata.update_failed: Failed to update the GEO database

sshd.tip: When enabled, a local port will be listened on. You can use an SSH client to access authorized SSH assets with the same account and password as this system.
sshd.private_key_modal_tip: Generate or paste your private key.

port_forwarding.host_port_tip: Separate targets with commas, using host:port. Use * as the port to allow any port. VS Code Remote-SSH requires 127.0.0.1:*.

sshd.usage_tip: The SSH service can open the asset picker or connect directly to a specified asset.
sshd.mode_proxy_tip: Log in with the bastion account first, then choose a target asset from the terminal asset list.
sshd.direct_proxy_tip: Specify the target asset during connection and enter it immediately after authentication. asset-name is the asset name; asset-alias is the recommended asset alias.
sshd.direct_proxy_vscode: Recommended for VS Code Remote-SSH ssh config:
sshd.private_key_required_to_enable: Set an auth private key before enabling SSH service.

rdp_proxy.tip: When enabled, users can download .rdp files with short-lived tickets and access authorized RDP assets through a fixed proxy address.
rdp_proxy.public_addr_extra: Address used in generated .rdp files. When empty, it is inferred from the listen address and current request.
rdp_proxy.ticket_ttl_extra: Defaults to 300 seconds. A ticket is marked as used after successful resolution.
rdp_proxy.usage_tip: Users choose an RDP asset in the web UI to create a ticket. The RDP client connects to the proxy address, and the proxy resolves it to the real asset.
rdp_proxy.ticket_flow_tip: The .rdp username is NTICKET:<ticketId>, and the password is the ticket secret entered during connection.

mail.tip: You need to enable email before sending test email.
mail.title: Email Subject

notification.recipients_placeholder: Separate multiple recipients with commas, semicolons, or new lines
notification.webhook_url_required: Please enter the full Webhook URL
notification.webhook_url_invalid: Please enter a full URL starting with http:// or https://
notification.wecom_app_origin_required: Please enter the WeCom API URL
notification.wecom_app_corp_id_required: Please enter the WeCom Corp ID
notification.wecom_app_corp_secret_required: Please enter the WeCom App Secret
notification.wecom_app_agent_id_required: Please enter the WeCom App ID

user_search.size_limit_tooltip: LDAP max search results, 0 means unlimited.

oidc.scopes_placeholder: Please enter scopes, separated by spaces, e.g., openid profile email

backup.restore_confirm_content: Restore will overwrite the current PostgreSQL database. The system will automatically create a safety backup before restoring.
backup.exclude_tip: Excludes: session recordings and Windows mounted disk files
backup.backup_directory_tip: Backup directory: {{directory}}. Backups exclude session recordings and Windows mounted disk files.
backup.upload_restore_confirm_content: This will upload a local backup file and overwrite the current PostgreSQL database. Use it for cross-server migration. The system will automatically create a safety backup before restoring.
backup.legacy_import_tip: Only used to import JSON data exported from older versions. It is not suitable for full backup restore in the current version.
backup.success_actions_tip: Upload the backup file to remote storage after it is created. Remote upload failures will not delete the local backup file.
backup.saved_secret_placeholder: Saved, leave blank to keep unchanged
backup.webdav_chinese_path_tip: Do not use Chinese paths to avoid upload failures caused by WebDAV path encoding or permission mapping.

license.name: License Name
license.domain_tip: Used to request a domain-bound license and verify the current access domain. Enter a domain without scheme, port, or path.
license.domain_error: Enter a valid domain without scheme, port, path, or wildcard

restricted.label: Restricted Access
restricted.content: Current license doesn't support this feature.

oidc_server.description: Configure OIDC Server to make this system an OpenID Connect provider, allowing other apps to use this system for SSO.
oidc_server.manage_tip_prefix: After enabling, you can manage apps in "
oidc_server.issuer_tooltip: OIDC issuer identifier, usually this system's access address + /api
oidc_server.access_token_ttl_tooltip: Access Token validity, default 3600 seconds (1 hour)
oidc_server.refresh_token_ttl_tooltip: Refresh Token validity, default 604800 seconds (7 days)
oidc_server.id_token_ttl_tooltip: ID Token validity, default 3600 seconds (1 hour)
oidc_server.auth_code_ttl_tooltip: Authorization code validity, default 600 seconds (10 minutes)

network.trust_ip_tip: Determines whether forwarded IP headers are trusted

access_request.request_reason_placeholder: Enter the reason for requesting access

ai_assistant.title: AI Assistant
ai_assistant.placeholder: Ask a question. Shift + Enter for newline
ai_assistant.command_shortcut_hint: Enter to run, Esc to reject
ai_assistant.pending_placeholder: Press Enter to run or Esc to reject

work_order.reason_placeholder: Please enter reason for executing this SQL

proxy.block_dml_tip: When enabled, only read-only SQL is allowed.
proxy.tip: Enable proxy to allow client connections and execute SQL.
proxy.usage_tip: Users connect to the proxy address from a database client, and the proxy forwards traffic to authorized database assets.
proxy.public_addr_extra: Address shown in the quick access entry for regular users. When empty, it is inferred from the listen address.
